proposal_summary: NNS Labs requests $398k in funding for Season 3 (a 12-month mandate) to continue developing vertical products like NOGS, NNS, and Noggles Club to increase onboarding, utility, and revenue streams for the Nouns ecosystem.

disclosed_entities.name: NNS Labs
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: NNS Labs is a development hub founded in 2022 and laser focused on the Nouns ecosystem.

disclosed_entities.name: NOGS
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: $NOGS, for one, is the first token in the Nouniverse to provide holders with tangible benefits

disclosed_entities.name: NounsDAO Treasury
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: This amount will be moved from the NFTs into NounsDAO treasury within 2 weeks.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Payment stream of $28k per month for 12 months and $60k upfront
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Fund NNS Labs team, engineering, community, marketing, and design for a 12-month period.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: A payment stream of $28k per month for 12 months that will cover the operations... $60k that will give us more flexibility... Total Requested: $398k

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal only requests standard DAO treasury payments (a stream and an upfront transfer).
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: We request a stream of $398k to drive these efforts over 12 months...

limitations: No specific recipient addresses or tokens (USDC/ETH) are explicitly provided in the text for the $398k payment.
